_note: Corporate milestones rendered as a vertical timeline. Entries are rendered top-to-bottom in the order listed — newest first reads best.

milestones.title: Expanding into Property Development
milestones.body: SQA formally expands its business beyond contracting, taking positions in selective joint-venture arrangements with landowners — targeting shop-office, industrial, and residential developments.

milestones.title: Growing Japanese Corporate Client Base
milestones.body: Continued delivery of turnkey industrial and logistics projects for Japanese multinationals, strengthening SQA's reputation as a trusted cross-border construction partner.

milestones.title: IBS-Led Industrial Delivery
milestones.body: SQA significantly scales its use of Industrialised Building Systems (IBS) for large-span industrial projects — delivering faster completion times with improved quality consistency.

milestones.title: Achieved CIDB Grade G7
milestones.body: SQA Builders is upgraded to CIDB Grade G7 — the highest Malaysian contractor grade — qualifying the firm for construction works of unlimited value in both public and private sectors.

milestones.title: Institutional & Diplomatic Projects
milestones.body: SQA is selected to deliver institutional work including school expansions and diplomatic chancery buildings — reflecting the firm's ability to handle projects under enhanced compliance protocols.

milestones.title: First Major Turnkey Industrial Contract
milestones.body: SQA delivers its first large-scale turnkey warehouse and office complex, establishing the template for its combined design, procurement, and construction offering.

milestones.title: SQA Group Established
milestones.body: The SQA Group is founded — anchored on three principles: Speed, Quality, and Assurance. From the outset, the Group positions itself as a progressive Malaysian-Japanese contractor.
